channel.title: INhealth
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from INhealth, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: What Adequate Daily Hydration Does to the Human Body
Meghan Trainor on Resilience, Wellness, and Developing Healthier Habits
item.description: Meghan Trainor discusses filtering out public criticism, focusing on her physical health, and building consistent routines that support her well-being.

item.title: Eight Practical Strategies for Meeting Your Daily Protein Requirements
Research Points to Social Connection as a Meaningful Mood-Booster
item.description: Social activities such as going to the movies may offer measurable mental health benefits, according to emerging research on the role of connection in well-being.

item.title: Study Finds a Specific Dietary Addition Can Reduce Blood Pressure
item.description: Research suggests that adding one particular food to the diet can lower blood pressure and support digestive health.
